textTab.translationDesc: Translate text between 6 languages (Auto, FR, EN, ES, DE, IT, PT)
textTab.summaryDesc: Create a concise summary of the text
textTab.rewriteDesc: Improve the clarity and professionalism of the text
textTab.usageDesc: Enter your text, choose the function, and click the corresponding button.

fileTab.translateFileDesc: Translates and downloads the file in its original format
fileTab.summarizeFileDesc: Creates a summary of the content
fileTab.rewriteFileDesc: Improves the quality of the writing
fileTab.timeoutDesc: Adjust the waiting time according to file size (1 min to 2 hours)
fileTab.dragDrop: Drag & Drop or Click to Upload

apiTab.note1: All /file endpoints accept a timeout parameter (60-7200s)
apiTab.note2: Translated files are returned in their original format
apiTab.note3: File summaries and rewrites return JSON

messages.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload .docx, .pdf, .txt, or .html
messages.fileTranslatedSuccess: File translated successfully! Check your downloads.
